message:
feat(web): upgrade Extensions to support TypeId-keyed typed state extraction

Generalize the web framework's state management from string-only to
fully typed, enabling ergonomic State<T> extraction for any
Clone + Send + Sync + 'static type:

- Extensions: add a secondary HashMap<TypeId, Arc<dyn Any + Send + Sync>>
  alongside the existing string map, with insert_typed<T>(), get_typed<T>(),
  get_typed_cloned<T>(), and extend_from() for merging extension sets
- State<T>: generalize from State<String> to generic State<T>, extracting
  via get_typed_cloned with error messages that include the type name
- Router: add extensions field and with_state<T>(state) builder method;
  request handling now injects router-level state into every request via
  extend_from before dispatching to handlers
- Custom Debug impl for Extensions avoids requiring Debug on stored values

Includes tests for typed extraction, missing state 500 errors, extend_from
merging, and end-to-end state reaching handlers through the router.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
